case_title: DAVE HILBURN VS. IDISCOVER GLOBAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILBURN, DAVE AS TO DEFENDANT IDISCOVER GLOBAL, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
